heading: Limitation on recourse
label: 927 Limitation on recourse
text: The holder of a claim payable solely from special revenues of the debtor under applicable nonbankruptcy law shall not be treated as having recourse against the debtor on account of such claim pursuant to .section 1111(b) of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 927 was renumbered .section 930 of this title

Effective DateSection effective , but not applicable to any case commenced under this title before that date, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1988 Amendment note under .Nov. 3, 1988section 12 of Pub. L. 100–597section 101 of this title
